mapper.insert: INSERT INTO city_location (city_name, adm, lon_and_lat) VALUES (#{cityName}, #{adm}, #{lonAndLat})
INSERT INTO city_location (city_name, adm, lon_and_lat) VALUES (#{cityName}, #{adm}, #{lonAndLat}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lon_and_lat = VALUES(lon_and_lat)
mapper.select: SELECT city_name, adm, lon_and_lat FROM city_location
